biological_replicate: littermates of wildtype C57BL/6J and RhoP23H/+ knock-in mice (including both sexes)
experimental_design: In pre-clinical models, nanomolar pyrvinium pamoate protected against retinal degeneration
factor_value: identified pyrvinium pamoate as a nuclear speckle rehabilitator
